nasb.text: Your adversaries have roared in the midst of Your meeting place; They have set up their own standards for signs.

esv.text: Your foes have roared in the midst of your meeting place; they set up their own signs for signs.

cnv.text: 你的敵人在敬拜你的聚會中吼叫， 他們豎起了自己的旗幟為記號。

ccb.text: 他们在你圣所中高声叫嚷， 竖立起自己的旗帜。

csbs.text: 你的敌人在你的会所中吼叫， 设立了自己的标帜为记号；
